headings.name: Playfair Display
headings.usage: All headings, cover titles, dramatic statements

body.name: Manrope
body.usage: UI text, settings panels, buttons, long-form content

preview_studio.center_panel: flex-1 bg-magical-ink flex items-center justify-center (Live Preview)

customer_viewer.structure: Fullscreen container, centered flipbook, auto-hiding controls

buttons.primary: bg-magical-ink text-magical-cream hover:bg-magical-plum transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-serif tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-magical-ink/20 text-magical-ink hover:bg-magical-cream transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-sans
buttons.magic: bg-gradient-to-r from-magical-rose to-magical-gold text-white font-serif tracking-widest uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-glow hover:shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300

cards.storybook_card: group relative bg-white rounded-xl shadow-soft hover:shadow-floating transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden border border-magical-ink/5 aspect-[4/3]

inputs.style: bg-white/50 border-magical-ink/10 focus:border-magical-rose focus:ring-1 focus:ring-magical-rose rounded-lg p-3 font-sans transition-all

accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable page flip animations if prefers-reduced-motion is true

login_bg.alt: Grand magical library with warm lighting

libraries.3d_effects: react-pageflip (or custom CSS 3D transforms if unavailable)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config first with the 'magical' color palette.
2. Create the 'Admin Layout' (Warm Cream bg) and 'Viewer Layout' (Midnight Ink bg) as separate layout components.
3. Implement the 'Preview Studio' with a strict 3-panel grid. Left=Controls, Center=Stage, Right=Actions.
4. Use 'Playfair Display' for all headings. Import it from Google Fonts via simple CSS import.
5. For the flipbook effect, prioritize 'HTML/CSS 3D Transforms' if a library is too heavy, but 'react-pageflip' is recommended if available.
6. Ensure the mobile view defaults to 'One Page Spread' while desktop defaults to 'Two Page Spread'.
7. Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, flip controls).
8. NEVER use default blue links. Use Magical Rose or Dusty Gold.
9. Use the Grand Library image for the Login page with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text readability.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
Do not center align the App container.
